features: ✅【WHAT YOU WILL GET】Package including 12 packs of cruise lanyard with waterproof ID card holder. Lanyards length is 46cm/18.11in. Clear badge holders measure 100x85cm/ 3.94x3.5in, inner dimension is 90x60cm/2.36 x 3.54in, easy to place cards. Please kindly check the size in the picture and make sure it can match your cards.

✅【ADEQUATE COLOR CHOICES】Our lanyards for id badges are available in various colors include black, dark blue, blue,dark blue, gray, red, yellow, green, fluorescent green, pink, orange, purple and sufficient quantity, you can identify someone according to the different lanyard colors. In group activities and particular is very convenient.

✅【HIGH QUALITY LANYARDS】Our lanyards are made of soft and lightweight material, smooth and comfortable for wearing. With strong hook clips made of premium metal, strong and durable to keep cards secure.

✅【WATERPROOF AND ZIPPER DESIGN】The horizontal badge holder is made of high quality PVC, high transparency and tear resistant with resealable zipper on the top, easy to close and open, can keep your important cards clean and safe.

✅【CONVENIENT & WIDELY USED】Our lanyard badge holder is suitable for wherever you need to display a badge like cruise carnival trip, business meetings, travel, classes and birthday parties. Perfect for ID cards, cruise cards, work cards, student cards, bus passes and so on.
